Grazie!
Record Received · The Garofalo Family · June 6, 2026

Thank you for being part of this. We can't wait to celebrate with you on June 6th.

FAMIGGHIA
Una Festa Per Voi · June 6, 2026

Tell Us YourPart of the Story

Ninety years. Fifty-eight years together. A family that spans generations and countries and dining room tables that never seemed quite big enough. We're building a living portrait of everyone who's part of our family story — and we'd love to include yours.

Share Your Photos

Have a photo from a family moment, a holiday, or a great shot of Giovanni and Vittoria? Upload as many as you like — no form needed.

Upload Photos to Dropbox No account needed · any number of photos

Your photos will go directly to the family archive. You can upload as many as you like in any format — JPG, PNG, HEIC, or video.

Let's Start
Your Information

Just the basics — we'll use this to put a face to a name on the night.

Please include your email so we can send you the photos after the event.
02
Your Connection
How Are You Part of the Family?

Pick the option that fits best. Don't overthink it — we'll ask you to tell us more below.

03
Your Party
Who Are You Bringing?

If you're coming with family — a spouse, your kids, your parents — add them here so we can connect everyone in the tree.

04
Your Roots
Your Mom & Dad

This is how we connect the dots. Even if your parents aren't attending, knowing their names helps us place you in the right branch of the family.

05
Your Memory
A Memory, a Story, a Toast

What's a moment with Giovanni, Vittoria, or the family that's memorable? A meal, a laugh, a birthday party? Write it here — it'll be part of the archive.

Your Portrait
Put a Face to Your Name

Upload a photo of yourself — it doesn't have to be fancy. It'll appear on your profile at the celebration with a beautiful vintage treatment.

Upload a Photo of Yourself Opens Dropbox · no account needed
Upload a Photo of Yourself JPG, PNG or HEIC · up to 10MB

May we use your photo at the celebration and in the family archive?

Your photo may be displayed on the night of June 6th and included in the digital family tree we're building.

Everything you share stays in the family. After the celebration, we'll send you a link so you can explore the whole tree yourself.

You'll also need to add an email address to complete your submission.

The Garofalo Family · June 6, 2026 Western Reserve Historical Society, Cleveland Hosted by Claudia, John, Sandra, and Marcello
